description_long: This is a rustic-style chest of drawers constructed from weathered wood, featuring a rectangular form with four spacious drawers on the front. The drawers are equipped with simple, circular cut-out handles, giving the piece a minimalist and functional appearance. The top surface is fitted with a soft, patterned changing pad, suggesting it may be used as a changing table in addition to storage. The sides and back are composed of horizontal wooden planks, maintaining a consistent, aged wood texture throughout. The legs are short and sturdy, providing stable support for the structure. The overall finish is matte, with a grayish-brown tone that highlights the natural grain and imperfections of the wood.
description: A rustic, weathered wood chest of drawers with four drawers and circular cut-out handles, topped with a patterned changing pad. The piece has a matte, gray-brown finish and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing four drawers with circular cut-out handles and a patterned changing pad on top.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the horizontal wooden plank construction and the edge of the changing pad.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the full back panel of horizontal wooden planks and the back of the changing pad.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the plank construction and the side of the changing pad.
